seoTitle: Glebe vs Glen Alice — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Glebe and Glen Alice. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Glebe vs Glen Alice: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Glebe and Glen Alice.
heading: Glebe vs Glen Alice — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Glebe, New South Wales and Glen Alice, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Glen Alice has a lower overall climate risk score (43/100) compared to Glebe (43/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Glebe or Glen Alice safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Glebe has a flood risk score of 60/100, while Glen Alice scores 55/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Glebe scores 42/100 for bushfire risk. Glen Alice scores 57/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Glebe or Glen Alice?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Glen Alice has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
